have hDifferent: \({u\left(0\right)} \neq {u\left(1\right)} \to {\left({\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {\operatorname{if}\;{u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hu, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hRowDeterminantIn (2 steps)
statement: u 0 ≠ u 1 → matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L273319
assume hneq;
L273320
thus thesis by transitivity using ring_zero_multiplication_right from hu, hneq, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hRowDeterminantIn;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (eq_i_tra (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u)) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λw ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) w)) u hu) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) z) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λw ⇒ if w 0 = w 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) u hu))) (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) z) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (ring_zero K add) (If_i_0 (u 0 = u 1) (ring_one K mul) (ring_zero K add) hneq)) (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add)) (ring_zero K add) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (god1_ring_zero_multiplication_right K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) hRowDeterminantIn) (eq_sym (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (ring_zero K add) (If_i_0 (u 0 = u 1) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add) hneq)))));
end;
L273380
thus thesis by orE from hSame, hDifferent;
formal
exact (orE (u 0 = u 1) (u 0 ≠ u 1) (xm (u 0 = u 1)) (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) hSame hDifferent);
end;
L273388
apply extensionality from hRowProductIn, hRowScaledUnitIn;
L273394L273395
let u; assume hu;
L273396L273397
have hu0: \({u\left(0\right)} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\) by hu;
formal
statement: u 0 ∈ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (andEL (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu));
L273399L273400
have hu1: \({u\left(1\right)} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\) by hu;
formal
statement: u 1 ∈ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (andER (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu));
L273402L273403
have hPairEta: \({\left(u\left(0\right),u\left(1\right)\right)} = {u}\) by tuple_Sigma_eta from hu;
formal
statement: (u 0,u 1) = u;
proof term: exact (tuple_Sigma_eta (ordsucc n) (λ_ ⇒ ordsucc n) u hu);
L273404
thus thesis by transitivity from hPairEta, hEntryGoal, hu0, hu1, hRowScaledUnitValue, hu;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) u) (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) (u 0) (u 1)) (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) z) u (u 0,u 1) (eq_sym (u 0,u 1) u hPairEta)) (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) (u 0) (u 1)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (hEntryGoal (u 0) hu0 (u 1) hu1) (eq_sym (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (hRowScaledUnitValue u hu))));
end;
L273450
thus thesis by h_s24_t2_matrix_times_adjugate, h_s24_t2_adjugate_times_matrix;
formal
exact (andI (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) = matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n))) (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A = matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n))) h_s24_t2_matrix_times_adjugate h_s24_t2_adjugate_times_matrix);
∎
